{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Li Elders
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Li Elders]] are associated with [[Markuth]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
